title: The Eagle And The Crow
content:
The Eagle flew off with a lamb;
    Then the Crow thought to lift an old ram,
    In his eaglish conceit,
    The wool tangled his feet,
    And the shepherd laid hold of the sham.

    Beware Of Overrating Your Own Powers
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Walter Crane delivers a powerful performance in "The Eagle And The Crow"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
